metadata.description: Authenticated HTTP proxy for third-party APIs via Auth0 Token Vault. Make API calls to Gmail, Slack, GitHub, and more with automatic OAuth token management.

plugins.name: auth0-token-vault-proxy
plugins.description: Make authenticated HTTP requests to third-party APIs (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Google Calendar) on behalf of authenticated users via Auth0 Token Vault. Use when the user wants to make authenticated API calls, connect or disconnect OAuth providers, or check their authentication and connection status. Wraps the tv-proxy CLI as a generic authenticated fetch proxy.
